EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Process {subject.process.name} was detected changing the registry key appinit_dlls to {object.new_value}, which is responsible for launching user DLLs when accessing user32.dll, on the host {event_src.host}
Process {subject.process.name} changed the autorun registry key parameter on host {event_src.host}

Process {subject.process.name} was detected changing the registry key loadappinit_dlls, which is responsible for allowing execution of user DLLs when accessing user32.dll, on the host {event_src.host}
Process {subject.process.name} created a file in the startup folder on host {event_src.host}
